untranslatable_reason: Strategy requires ranking stocks by past 6-month returns and selecting top/bottom deciles (winners/losers). This requires cross-sectional portfolio construction logic unavailable in single-instrument indicator rules. The 'returns' conditions above represent the observed winner-loser spread (0.04946 or 4.946%) as a proxy, but true implementation requires a universe ranking mechanism not expressible in this single-bar rule schema.
translation_notes: Formation period (F) = 6 months sourced from F=6 row in source table. Holding period (H) = 3 months. Winner-loser spread coefficient = 0.04946 (4.946% monthly return differential). t-statistic = 2.626 indicates statistical significance. Long positions enter on winners; short positions enter on losers. Exit after 63 trading days (~3 calendar months). The strategy is inherently relative-value / pair-trade based and cannot be fully translated to absolute indicator conditions.
